
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely import wkt
import altair as alt
import json

alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()

CRASH_FP = r"C:\Users\maosi\final-project-luchen-xinyi-sirui\data\raw-data\Traffic_Crashes.csv"
COMM_FP  = r"C:\Users\maosi\final-project-luchen-xinyi-sirui\data\raw-data\Boundaries_-_Community_Areas_20260122.csv"
RED_FP   = r"C:\Users\maosi\final-project-luchen-xinyi-sirui\data\raw-data\Red_Light_Camera_Locations_20260122.csv"
SPEED_FP = r"C:\Users\maosi\final-project-luchen-xinyi-sirui\data\raw-data\Speed_Camera_Locations_20260222.csv"

crash = pd.read_csv(CRASH_FP)
comm  = pd.read_csv(COMM_FP)
redlight = pd.read_csv(RED_FP)
speed = pd.read_csv(SPEED_FP)

crash["CRASH_DATE"] = pd.to_datetime(crash["CRASH_DATE"], errors="coerce")
crash["YEAR"] = crash["CRASH_DATE"].dt.year
crash["MONTH"] = crash["CRASH_DATE"].dt.month
```

1.Data Completeness: Month Covered per Year
```{python}
months_per_year = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR", "MONTH"])
         .groupby(["YEAR", "MONTH"])
         .size()
         .reset_index(name="n")        
         .groupby("YEAR")["MONTH"]
         .nunique()
         .reset_index(name="months_covered")
         .sort_values("YEAR")
)

months_per_year
```
```{python}
months_chart = alt.Chart(months_per_year).mark_bar(color="#9ecae1").encode(
    x=alt.X("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y(
        "months_covered:Q",
        title="Number of Months with Data",
        scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 12])
    ),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
        alt.Tooltip("months_covered:Q", title="Months covered")
    ]
).properties(
    title="Data Completeness: Months Covered per Year",
    width=750,
    height=400
)

months_chart
```

2.Annual Number of Crashed
```{python}
annual_crashes = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR"])
         .groupby("YEAR")
         .size()
         .reset_index(name="crash_count")
         .sort_values("YEAR")
)

annual_crashes
```

```{python}

annual_chart = alt.Chart(annual_crashes).mark_bar(color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y("crash_count:Q", title="Annual Number of Crashes"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
        alt.Tooltip("crash_count:Q", title="Crashes")
    ]
).properties(
    title="Annual Number of Crashes",
    width=750,
    height=400
)

annual_chart
```

3.Average Crashed By Month (2018-2025)
```{python}
season_df = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR", "MONTH"])
         .query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025")
         .groupby(["YEAR", "MONTH"])
         .size()
         .reset_index(name="crash_count")
)

monthly_avg = (
    season_df.groupby("MONTH")["crash_count"]
             .mean()
             .reset_index(name="avg_monthly_crashes")
             .sort_values("MONTH")
)

monthly_avg
```
```{python}
season_chart = alt.Chart(monthly_avg).mark_line(point=True, color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "MONTH:O",
        title="Month",
        sort=list(range(1,13)),
        axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)
    ),
    y=alt.Y("avg_monthly_crashes:Q", title="Average Monthly Crashes"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("MONTH:O", title="Month"),
        alt.Tooltip("avg_monthly_crashes:Q", title="Avg crashes", format=",.0f")
    ]
).properties(
    title="Seasonality: Average Crashes by Month (2018–2025)",
    width=750,
    height=400
)

season_chart
```

4.Average Crashes by Hour of Day (2018-2025)
```{python}
hour_df = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR","CRASH_HOUR"])
         .query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025")
         .groupby(["YEAR","CRASH_HOUR"])
         .size()
         .reset_index(name="crash_count")
)

hour_avg = (
    hour_df.groupby("CRASH_HOUR")["crash_count"]
           .mean()
           .reset_index(name="avg_crashes")
           .sort_values("CRASH_HOUR")
)

hour_avg
```
```{python}
overall_avg = hour_avg["avg_crashes"].mean()
overall_avg
bars = alt.Chart(hour_avg).mark_bar(color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X("CRASH_HOUR:O",
            title="Hour of Day (0–23)",
            axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)),
    y=alt.Y("avg_crashes:Q",
            title="Average Crashes"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("CRASH_HOUR:O", title="Hour"),
        alt.Tooltip("avg_crashes:Q", title="Avg crashes", format=",.0f")
    ]
)

line = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({"y":[overall_avg]})).mark_rule(
    strokeDash=[6,6],
    color="black"
).encode(y="y:Q")

hour_chart = (bars + line).properties(
    title="Average Crashes by Hour of Day (2018–2025)",
    width=750,
    height=400
)

hour_chart
```

5.Crashes Heatmap: Hour × Day of Week (Average, 2018–2025)
```{python}
heat_df = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR","CRASH_HOUR","CRASH_DAY_OF_WEEK"])
         .query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025")
         .groupby(["YEAR","CRASH_DAY_OF_WEEK","CRASH_HOUR"])
         .size()
         .reset_index(name="crash_count")
)

heat_avg = (
    heat_df.groupby(["CRASH_DAY_OF_WEEK","CRASH_HOUR"])["crash_count"]
           .mean()
           .reset_index(name="avg_crashes")
)

heat_avg
```
```{python}
weekday_map = {
1:"Sunday",
2:"Monday",
3:"Tuesday",
4:"Wednesday",
5:"Thursday",
6:"Friday",
7:"Saturday"
}

heat_avg["weekday"] = heat_avg["CRASH_DAY_OF_WEEK"].map(weekday_map)

heat_chart = alt.Chart(heat_avg).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("CRASH_HOUR:O",
            title="Hour of Day (0–23)"),
    
    y=alt.Y("weekday:O",
            title="Day of Week",
            sort=["Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday"]),
    
    color=alt.Color(
        "avg_crashes:Q",
        title="Avg Crashes",
        scale=alt.Scale(
            range=["#e0f3db","#a8ddb5","#43a2ca"]
        )
    ),
    
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("weekday:N", title="Day"),
        alt.Tooltip("CRASH_HOUR:O", title="Hour"),
        alt.Tooltip("avg_crashes:Q", title="Avg crashes", format=",.0f")
    ]
).properties(
    title="Crashes Heatmap: Hour × Day of Week (Average, 2018–2025)",
    width=750,
    height=350
)

heat_chart
```

6.Crash Severity Distribution
```{python}
severity_df = (
    crash.dropna(subset=["YEAR","MOST_SEVERE_INJURY"])
         .query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025")
)

severity_share = (
    severity_df["MOST_SEVERE_INJURY"]
    .value_counts(normalize=True)
    .mul(100)
    .reset_index()
)

severity_share.columns = ["severity","share"]
severity_share
```
```{python}
order = [
"NO INDICATION OF INJURY",
"REPORTED, NOT EVIDENT",
"NONINCAPACITATING INJURY",
"INCAPACITATING INJURY",
"FATAL"
]

severity_share["severity"] = pd.Categorical(
    severity_share["severity"],
    categories=order,
    ordered=True
)

severity_share = severity_share.sort_values("severity")

severity_chart = alt.Chart(severity_share).mark_bar(
    color="#43a2ca"
).encode(
    y=alt.Y(
        "severity:N",
        sort=order,
        title="Most Severe Injury"
    ),
    
    x=alt.X(
        "share:Q",
        title="Share of Crashes (%)"
    ),
    
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("severity:N", title="Severity"),
        alt.Tooltip("share:Q", title="Share (%)", format=".1f")
    ]
).properties(
    title="Crash Severity Distribution (2018–2025)",
    width=750,
    height=350
)

severity_chart
text = severity_chart.mark_text(
    align="left",
    baseline="middle",
    dx=5
).encode(
    text=alt.Text("share:Q", format=".1f")
)

severity_chart + text
```

7.Top Roadway Surface Conditions in Crashes
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()
col = "ROADWAY_SURFACE_COND"

top_n = 10
counts = df[col].fillna("UNKNOWN").astype(str).value_counts()

top = counts.head(top_n)
other = counts.iloc[top_n:].sum()

surf = pd.concat([top, pd.Series({"OTHER": other})]).reset_index()
surf.columns = ["surface", "n"]
surf["share_pct"] = surf["n"] / surf["n"].sum() * 100
surf
```
```{python}
base = alt.Chart(surf).mark_bar(color="#43a2ca").encode(
    y=alt.Y("surface:N", sort="-x", title=None),
    x=alt.X("n:Q", title="Crashes"),
    tooltip=["surface", alt.Tooltip("n:Q", format=",.0f"), alt.Tooltip("share_pct:Q", format=".1f")]
).properties(title="Top Roadway Surface Conditions in Crashes", width=750, height=360)
base 
```

8.Lightning Conditions in Crashes
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()
col = "LIGHTING_CONDITION"

top_n = 10
counts = df[col].fillna("UNKNOWN").astype(str).value_counts()

top = counts.head(top_n)
other = counts.iloc[top_n:].sum()

light = pd.concat([top, pd.Series({"OTHER": other})]).reset_index()
light.columns = ["lighting", "n"]
light["share_pct"] = light["n"] / light["n"].sum() * 100
light
```
```{python}
base = alt.Chart(light).mark_bar(color="#a8ddb5").encode(
    y=alt.Y("lighting:N", sort="-x", title=None),
    x=alt.X("n:Q", title="Crashes"),
    tooltip=["lighting", alt.Tooltip("n:Q", format=",.0f"), alt.Tooltip("share_pct:Q", format=".1f")]
).properties(title="Lighting", width=750, height=320)

base 
```

9.Primary contributory causes
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()
col = "PRIM_CONTRIBUTORY_CAUSE"

top_n = 10
counts = df[col].fillna("UNKNOWN").astype(str).value_counts()

top = counts.head(top_n)
other = counts.iloc[top_n:].sum()

cause = pd.concat([top, pd.Series({"OTHER": other})]).reset_index()
cause.columns = ["cause", "n"]
cause["share_pct"] = cause["n"] / cause["n"].sum() * 100
cause
```
```{python}
base = alt.Chart(cause).mark_bar(color="#43a2ca").encode(
    y=alt.Y("cause:N", sort="-x", title=None),
    x=alt.X("n:Q", title="Crashes"),
    tooltip=["cause", alt.Tooltip("n:Q", format=",.0f"), alt.Tooltip("share_pct:Q", format=".1f")]
).properties(title="Primary Cause", width=750, height=420)
base
```

10.eatmap of total injuries（Year × Month）
```{python}
inj = (
    crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025")
         .dropna(subset=["YEAR","MONTH"])
         .groupby(["YEAR","MONTH"])["INJURIES_TOTAL"]
         .sum()
         .reset_index(name="total_injuries")
)

inj.head()
```
```{python}
inj_heat = alt.Chart(inj).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("MONTH:O", title="Month", sort=list(range(1,13)), axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)),
    y=alt.Y("YEAR:O", title="Year", sort="ascending"),
    color=alt.Color(
        "total_injuries:Q",
        title="Injuries",
        scale=alt.Scale(range=["#e0f3db", "#a8ddb5", "#43a2ca"])
    ),
    tooltip=["YEAR:O","MONTH:O", alt.Tooltip("total_injuries:Q", format=",.0f")]
).properties(title="Injuries Heatmap", width=750, height=320)

inj_heat
```

11.Total injuries over time
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()
df = df.dropna(subset=["CRASH_DATE"])

df["year_month"] = df["CRASH_DATE"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

inj_month = (
    df.groupby("year_month")["INJURIES_TOTAL"]
      .sum()
      .reset_index(name="total_injuries")
      .sort_values("year_month")
)

inj_line = alt.Chart(inj_month).mark_line(color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X("year_month:T", title="Month"),
    y=alt.Y("total_injuries:Q", title="Total injuries"),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip("year_month:T", title="Month"),
             alt.Tooltip("total_injuries:Q", format=",.0f")]
).properties(title="Injuries Over Time", width=750, height=320)

inj_line
```

12.Fatal rate by first crash type
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()

df["fatal_flag"] = df["INJURIES_FATAL"].fillna(0).astype(float) > 0

tmp = (
    df.dropna(subset=["FIRST_CRASH_TYPE"])
      .groupby("FIRST_CRASH_TYPE")
      .agg(
          total=("FIRST_CRASH_TYPE","size"),
          fatal=("fatal_flag","sum")
      )
      .reset_index()
)

tmp["fatal_rate"] = tmp["fatal"] / tmp["total"]

min_total = 1000
top_k = 15
fatal_type = (
    tmp.query("total >= @min_total")
       .sort_values("fatal_rate", ascending=False)
       .head(top_k)
)

fatal_bar = alt.Chart(fatal_type).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X("FIRST_CRASH_TYPE:N", sort="-y", title=None),
    y=alt.Y("fatal_rate:Q", title="Fatal rate"),
    color=alt.condition(
        alt.datum.fatal_rate >= fatal_type["fatal_rate"].median(),
        alt.value("#43a2ca"),
        alt.value("#a8ddb5")
    ),
    tooltip=["FIRST_CRASH_TYPE",
             alt.Tooltip("total:Q", format=",.0f"),
             alt.Tooltip("fatal:Q", format=",.0f"),
             alt.Tooltip("fatal_rate:Q", format=".4f")]
).properties(title="Fatal Rate by Crash Type", width=750, height=320)

fatal_bar
```

13.Annual fatal crashes
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()

df["fatal_flag"] = df["INJURIES_FATAL"].fillna(0).astype(float) > 0

year_fatal = (
    df.groupby("YEAR")
      .agg(
          total_crashes=("fatal_flag", "size"),
          fatal_crashes=("fatal_flag", "sum")
      )
      .reset_index()
      .sort_values("YEAR")
)

year_fatal["fatal_share_pct"] = year_fatal["fatal_crashes"] / year_fatal["total_crashes"] * 100
year_fatal
```
```{python}
fatal_count_chart = alt.Chart(year_fatal).mark_line(point=True, color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y("fatal_crashes:Q", title="Fatal crashes"),
    tooltip=["YEAR", "fatal_crashes", alt.Tooltip("total_crashes:Q", format=",")]
).properties(
    title="Annual Fatal Crashes",
    width=600,
    height=360
)

fatal_count_chart
```

14.Annual fatal share
```{python}
fatal_share_chart = alt.Chart(year_fatal).mark_line(point=True, color="#43a2ca").encode(
    x=alt.X("YEAR:O", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y("fatal_share_pct:Q", title="Fatal share (%)"),
    tooltip=["YEAR", alt.Tooltip("fatal_share_pct:Q", format=".3f"),
             alt.Tooltip("fatal_crashes:Q", format=",.0f"),
             alt.Tooltip("total_crashes:Q", format=",.0f")]
).properties(
    title="Fatal Share of Crashes",
    width=600,
    height=360
)

fatal_share_chart
```

15.Fatal Crash Rate by Posted Speed Limit
```{python}
df = crash.query("YEAR >= 2018 and YEAR <= 2025").copy()

df["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"] = pd.to_numeric(df["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"])
df = df[(df["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"] >= 0) & (df["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"] <= 70)]

df["fatal_flag"] = df["INJURIES_FATAL"].fillna(0).astype(float) > 0

bins = [0,20,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60,65,70]
labels = ["0-20","21-25","26-30","31-35","36-40","41-45","46-50","51-55","56-60","61-65","66-70"]

df["speed_bin"] = pd.cut(df["POSTED_SPEED_LIMIT"], bins=bins, labels=labels, include_lowest=True, right=True)

speed_stats = (
    df.dropna(subset=["speed_bin"])
      .groupby("speed_bin")
      .agg(total=("fatal_flag","size"), fatal=("fatal_flag","sum"))
      .reset_index()
)

speed_stats["fatal_rate"] = speed_stats["fatal"] / speed_stats["total"]

low_bins  = {"0-20","21-25","26-30"}
mid_bins  = {"31-35","51-55"}    
high_bins = {"36-40","41-45","46-50"}

def pick_color(b):
    if b in low_bins:  return "#e0f3db"
    if b in high_bins: return "#43a2ca"
    return "#a8ddb5"

speed_stats["bar_color"] = speed_stats["speed_bin"].astype(str).map(pick_color)

bars = alt.Chart(speed_stats).mark_bar(
    size=50   
).encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "speed_bin:O",
        title="Posted Speed Limit (mph)",
        sort=labels,
        axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)
    ),
    
    y=alt.Y(
        "fatal_rate:Q",
        title="Fatal Rate"
    ),
    
    color=alt.Color("bar_color:N", scale=None, legend=None),
    
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("speed_bin:N", title="Speed"),
        alt.Tooltip("fatal_rate:Q", format=".4f"),
        alt.Tooltip("total:Q", format=",")
    ]
)

line = alt.Chart(speed_stats).mark_line(
    color="#2c5c85",
    point=True,
    strokeWidth=1
).encode(
    x=alt.X("speed_bin:O", sort=labels),
    y="fatal_rate:Q"
)

chart = (bars + line).properties(
    title="Fatal Crash Rate by Posted Speed Limit",
    width=800,
    height=380
).configure_view(
    stroke="black",   
    strokeWidth=1.5  
)

chart
```

16.Crash Density Map
```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.colors import LinearSegmentedColormap

colors = ["#e0f3db", "#a8ddb5", "#43a2ca"]
cmap_gnbu = LinearSegmentedColormap.from_list("gnbu_custom", colors)

m = crash.copy()
m = m[(m["YEAR"] >= 2018) & (m["YEAR"] <= 2025)]
m = m.dropna(subset=["LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE"])

m = m[(m["LATITUDE"].between(41.6, 42.1)) &
      (m["LONGITUDE"].between(-88.0, -87.3))]

if len(m) > 200000:
    m = m.sample(200000, random_state=0)

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 8))

hb = plt.hexbin(
    m["LONGITUDE"],
    m["LATITUDE"],
    gridsize=120,  
    mincnt=1,
    cmap=cmap_gnbu
)

plt.colorbar(hb, label="Crash Density")
plt.title("Crash Density Map")
plt.xlabel("Longitude")
plt.ylabel("Latitude")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
